tagline: Globalny rynek - Najlepsze produkty z Chin

footer_about_text: SunTrade to Twój zaufany globalny rynek produktów najwyższej jakości z Chin.

meta_description: Odkryj produkty najwyższej jakości z Chin w najlepszych cenach. Wysyłka na cały świat, bezpieczna płatność przez Stripe.
auth_signin_required: Zaloguj się, aby zobaczyć swoje konto
auth_check_email: Sprawdź swój e-mail, aby potwierdzić konto
auth_forgot_subtitle: Wpisz swój e-mail, a wyślemy Ci link do zresetowania hasła
auth_reset_failed: Nie udało się wysłać linku. Spróbuj ponownie.
account_delete_confirm: Czy na pewno? Tej operacji nie można cofnąć.
privacy_s1_text: Welcome to SunTrade. We operate the website suntrade.store. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.
privacy_s2_personal_intro: When you place an order or contact us, we may collect:
privacy_s2_auto_intro: When you visit our website, we automatically collect certain information including:
privacy_s3_intro: We use the collected information to:
privacy_s3_li2: Send order confirmations and shipping updates
privacy_s4_text: All payment transactions are processed through Stripe. We do not store your credit card details. For more details, please visit stripe.com/privacy.
privacy_s5_intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with:
privacy_s5_li4: Shipping carriers — to deliver your orders
privacy_s5_text: These third parties are contractually obligated to protect your data.
privacy_s6_text: We retain your personal information only as long as necessary. Order data is retained for a minimum of 5 years for accounting and tax compliance.
privacy_s7_intro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy_s7_li1: Access the personal data we hold about you
privacy_s7_li3: Request deletion of your personal data
privacy_s7_li4: Object to or restrict processing of your data
privacy_s7_text: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at info@suntrade.store.
privacy_s8_text: We use essential cookies to maintain your shopping cart and session. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy_s9_text: We implement industry-standard security measures including SSL/TLS encryption and secure database access controls.
privacy_s10_text: Our Service is not intended for individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy_s11_text: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your country of residence.
privacy_s12_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.
privacy_s13_intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
terms_s1_text: By accessing and using suntrade.store, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms_s2_text: SunTrade is an online marketplace that connects customers with quality products primarily sourced from China.
terms_s3_text: To place orders, you may need to provide accurate and complete information including your name, email, phone number, and shipping address.
terms_s4_li1: All prices are displayed in Euros (EUR) and include applicable taxes.
terms_s4_li2: Prices may change without prior notice, but changes will not affect orders already confirmed.
terms_s4_li3: Product images are for illustrative purposes. Actual products may vary slightly.
terms_s4_li4: We reserve the right to limit the quantity of products purchased per customer.
terms_s4_li5: In the event of a pricing error, we reserve the right to cancel the order and issue a full refund.
terms_s5_order_text: By placing an order, you make an offer to purchase the selected products.
terms_s5_pay_text: All payments are processed securely through Stripe. We accept major credit and debit cards.
terms_s5_comm_text: SunTrade charges a service commission on each transaction, included in the displayed price.
terms_s6_li1: We ship to most countries worldwide. Shipping costs and estimated delivery times are displayed at checkout.
terms_s6_li2: Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to customs processing or carrier delays.
terms_s6_li3: International orders may be subject to import duties and taxes.
terms_s6_li4: Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery to the carrier.
terms_s7_return_text: You may request a return within 14 days of receiving your order if the product is:
terms_s7_li2: Significantly different from the product description
terms_s7_process_text: Contact us at info@suntrade.store with your order number and photos. Approved refunds will be processed within 5-10 business days.
terms_s7_nonret_intro: The following items cannot be returned:
terms_s7_nr1: Items that have been used, washed, or altered
terms_s8_li1: Use the Service for any illegal purpose
terms_s8_li3: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
terms_s8_li4: Interfere with the proper functioning of the website
terms_s8_li5: Use automated tools (bots, scrapers) to access the Service
terms_s8_li6: Resell products purchased from SunTrade without prior agreement
terms_s9_text: All content on this website is the property of SunTrade and is protected by copyright laws.
terms_s10_intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, SunTrade shall not be liable for:
terms_s10_li1: Any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages
terms_s10_li2: Loss of profits, data, or business opportunities
terms_s10_li3: Delays caused by third-party services or force majeure
terms_s10_li4: Product defects originating from the manufacturer
terms_s10_text: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid for the specific product.
terms_s11_text: Any disputes shall first be resolved through negotiation. These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Kazakhstan.
terms_s12_text: You agree to indemnify SunTrade from any claims arising out of your use of the Service or violation of these Terms.
terms_s13_text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting.
terms_s14_text: We may terminate your access to the Service immediately for any reason, including breach of these Terms.
terms_s15_text: If any provision is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force.
terms_s16_intro: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:
